# System Patterns
**Last Updated:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
**Generated by:** `/context-sync`, refined by `speckit-adr` decisions

## Backend Architecture
**Pattern:** [Clean Architecture (Domain/Application/Infrastructure/API) / Vertical Slice]
**CQRS:** MediatR [version] — Commands/Queries location: [Application/[Feature]/]
**Validation:** FluentValidation — validator colocated with handler
**Repository:** Interfaces in Application/Interfaces/, impl in Infrastructure/
**Error handling:** [Result<T> pattern / ProblemDetails / exceptions]

## Frontend Architecture
**Folder structure:** [feature-based / colocation / atomic]
**Server state:** TanStack Query [version] — hooks in features/[name]/hooks/
**Client state:** [Zustand / Redux Toolkit]
**API layer:** fetchers in src/api/, hooks wrap fetchers — see apiConventions.md
**Forms:** React Hook Form + Zod

## Git Workflow
**Branching:** [main / main+develop / trunk-based]
**Commits:** Conventional Commits, enforced by `speckit-git-commit`

---
> EXAMPLE: a payment-webhook handler project settled on Vertical Slice over Clean
> Architecture after `speckit-adr` recorded that the team's feature count (40+) made
> Clean Architecture's cross-cutting folders harder to navigate than per-feature
> slices. See `decisionLog.md` ADR-003 for the full reasoning — this is the kind of
> decision that belongs here once made, not re-litigated by every generated file.
